text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaa-ha-ha-ha! There you are, Ayabe! 
Happy birthday!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Don't bother me. You being around always 
attracts unwanted attention.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is my presence too dazzling for you? 
But I must ask you to bear with me, just 
for today!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: For I am here to give you a beautiful a cappella performance with Doto! And you get a VIP seat!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, let us drink♪ To you, who were born 
into my shining wooorld♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
What are you — c-cut it out!
We're in public!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, let us drink♪ Raise a glass in 
celebration of this wonderful daaay♪
